subcodes.first_line: In this day, if it be said that the whole world hath become as a single eye, or a single ear, verily this would be true, for every [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز اگر گفته شود تمام عالم یک بصر است و یا یک سمع صحیح است چه که ذره
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @East and West; communication between East and West, @the power of example, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @knowledge of self
